use_cases: Full-page hero section backgrounds with atmospheric light effects
Landing page decorative backgrounds for SaaS products
Section dividers with animated beam overlays
Premium product showcase backgrounds with dynamic lighting
Creative portfolio backgrounds with subtle motion
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated background component that renders multiple atmospheric light beams with configurable intensity levels (subtle, medium, strong). The component creates moving, pulsing light rays with varying hues in the cyan-to-blue spectrum, using requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps rendering. Ideal for hero sections and landing pages that need a premium, modern aesthetic without sacrificing performance.
